lines: okay this one's about Luke, you remember Luke
the boy with the glowy laser sword, the lightsaber yeah
and the bad guy in the black mask, Darth Vader, he breathes all loud
and they had this giant round space station, the Death Star
it could blow up a whole planet, boom
wait why is it called that
cause it's big as a moon and full of bad guys, okay lie down
so Luke flies his little ship to go blow it up
and he's got a new droid this time, a little round orange one called Bee-Pip
Bee-Pip beeps and finds the secret door
and Luke closes his eyes and uses the Force, the power the Jedi have
and pew, one shot, and the whole thing goes boom
everybody cheers, the end, night night
stories.tell_note: Obvious Star Wars (Luke, Darth Vader, Death Star, the Force named outright). Invented element: the droid 'Bee-Pip'.

lines: so there's this guy Han, he's kind of a pirate but a good one
and his best friend is a big hairy guy, like a giant dog-bear, Chewbaca
Chewbaca just goes rrraaargh and Han knows what he means
they fly the fastest ship there is, the Falcon
and they pick up a new passenger, a little spiky lizard lady named Sereen
Sereen is a bounty hunter but she owes Han money
why does she owe him money
cause she lost a card game, anyway
the bad guys chase them through the asteroids, pew pew
and Chewbaca pulls the lever and they zoom into the stars and disappear
lightspeed, gone, the end
stories.tell_note: Medium Star Wars (Han, Chewbacca mangled to 'Chewbaca', the Falcon; franchise not named). Invented element: bounty hunter 'Sereen'.

lines: this is the one with the little green wise guy in the swamp
the one who talks all backwards, Yoder
do or do not, there is no try, he says that
and a young warrior comes to him to learn the Force
the warrior brings his pet too, a little floaty robot ball named Tup
Tup keeps falling in the swamp water, plop
and Yoder makes a whole ship float up out of the mud with just his mind
whoa how
the Force, that's how, it's in everything he says
and the young one trains all night, lifting rocks with his eyes closed
okay that's enough, sleepy time
stories.tell_note: Medium Star Wars (Yoda mangled to 'Yoder', the Force, swamp = Dagobah; franchise not named). Invented element: the robot 'Tup'.

lines: okay a sad one, a long time ago
there were two knights who were like brothers, the best of friends
the younger one was the strongest there ever was, Anny-kin
but he got angry and scared and he turned to the dark side
what's the dark side
it's when you let the meanness win, anyway
and his teacher Oben begged him to stop, please don't do this
but they had to fight, on a planet made of fire and lava
and a little mouse droid the younger one built, Squeak, watched and beeped sad
Oben won but he was so so sad about it
and he carried Squeak away and never forgot his friend
the end, that one's a little sad huh
stories.tell_note: Subtle Star Wars (Anakin mangled 'Anny-kin', Obi-Wan as 'Oben', the dark side, lava planet = Mustafar; franchise never named). Invented element: droid 'Squeak'.

lines: there's a desert girl who waits and waits for her family
she scrubs old machines for food, way out in the sand
and one day a beeping droid rolls up with a secret map inside it
and the white-armor soldiers, the bucket-heads, come looking for it
she runs and meets a boy who can feel the power, the one that flows through everything
he closes his eyes and a sword of light comes on, vmmm
and her new friend, a grumpy little engineer named Pob, fixes their ship just in time
they fly up past the soldiers and join the good guys fighting back
is the power real
in this story it is, now close your eyes like the boy did, goodnight
stories.tell_note: Subtle Star Wars (desert scavenger = Rey/Jakku, the Force as 'the power', lightsaber, stormtroopers as 'bucket-heads', the Resistance; franchise never named). Invented element: engineer 'Pob'.
